key.name: active-tab
key.description: The stack page that was visible when the application was last used.

key.name: autohide-status-bar
key.description: Whether status messages hide themselves after a short delay.

key.name: show-all
key.description: Whether budget, category, and diagnostics sections show all rows instead of previews with More buttons.

key.name: compare-categories-previous-period
key.description: Whether spending cards compare the selected period with the previous period.

key.name: advanced-autofill
key.description: Whether forms may fill related fields from the value you choose, such as matching categories, budget codes, and directions.

key.name: advanced-features
key.description: Whether budget codes, direction controls, and detailed move options are shown.

key.name: remember-mode
key.description: How opened CSV data is remembered: forget for live session files, data-only for copied CSV storage, or data-and-analytics for copied CSV storage plus processed cache.

key.name: auto-clean-config
key.description: Whether rules pointing to missing budget codes are removed during reload and import.

key.name: dedupe-enabled
key.description: Whether duplicate transactions are skipped during import.

key.name: selected-year
key.description: The year selected in the overview comparison, or 0 for automatic.

key.name: selected-budget-month
key.description: The selected budget period in YYYY-MM format, or empty for automatic.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized when it was last closed.
